transcript.text: Hello, I've been doing Kyle's gym for a little bit now, so I think you're a doll. I'll do a little mission statement. I like to invent new ways of doing stuff. I think it's a good idea. I think everybody should try to be doing that.

And I think it's good to mix it up, have as many different exercises as possible because it's good for the body because you're moving all the different muscles in the body, all the different ways, which is good because you want your body, the whole body, all the muscles in your body to be worked.

And mentally, it's good also for me anyways, and I imagine for other people too, because, you know, if you're tired in one thing and you just, you know, not motivated to do something, you can, you can go and do some other exercise that you haven't done.

And I like to, uh, I pretty much, well, I record my entire workout. Um, that has benefits to the world in general, because if somebody ever wants to know what it takes to get from this physique to that physique, well, just check out my website because you can see my physique when I'm starting out and you can see my physique when I'm done.
